item.title: Post-CQ-005: Update CLAUDE.md cross-module security code section
item.intent: CLAUDE.md accurately reflects the canonical firewall location after CQ-005. Contributors find firewall code on first look.
item.description: CQ-005 moves applyFirewall()/removeFirewall() from src/build/launcher/firewall.ts to src/secure/firewall/firewall.ts. After CQ-005 completes, the CLAUDE.md 'Cross-module security code' section still references the old path: 'Egress firewall (iptables CLAWHQ_FWD) → src/build/launcher/firewall.ts'. This will mislead contributors looking for firewall code. Doc-only change, single section in one file. Steps: (1) Confirm CQ-005 is complete and src/secure/firewall/firewall.ts exists; (2) Open CLAUDE.md, find 'Cross-module security code' section; (3) Update firewall entry from src/build/launcher/firewall.ts to src/secure/firewall/firewall.ts; (4) Verify no other CLAUDE.md references point to the old location; (5) No code changes required.
